class.name: Exporter
class.brief_description: Static registry and dispatcher for [ResourceExporter] plugins.
class.description: [Exporter] maintains the global list of registered [ResourceExporter] instances and routes export requests to the one that claims the resource. All methods are static - there is no instance to construct. Use [Exporter] when you want to export resources directly. Extend [ResourceExporter] when you want to add or customize export behavior for a specific resource type, then register your exporter here with [method add_exporter]. [codeblock] var res_path = "res://textures/background.ctex" if Exporter.is_exportable_resource(res_path): var ext = Exporter.get_default_export_extension(res_path) Exporter.export_file("/output/background." + ext, res_path) [/codeblock]

method.name: add_exporter
method.description: Registers [param exporter] with the global registry. When [param at_front] is [code]true[/code], the exporter is inserted at the head of the list and takes priority over existing exporters for any resource types it also claims.

method.name: export_file
method.description: Finds the highest-priority registered exporter for [param res_path] and exports it to [param out_path]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: export_resource
method.description: Finds the matching exporter for the resource described by [param import_infos] and exports it to [param output_dir]. Returns an [ExportReport] summarizing the outcome.

method.name: get_default_export_extension
method.description: Returns the default output extension for [param res_path], as determined by the highest-priority exporter that handles it.

method.name: get_export_extensions
method.description: Returns every output extension that registered exporters are willing to produce for [param res_path].

method.name: get_exporter_from_path
method.description: Returns the first registered [ResourceExporter] capable of handling [param res_path], or [code]null[/code] if none match. Set [param nonpack_export] to [code]false[/code] to exclude exporters that only support exporting resources from inside a loaded pack.

method.name: is_exportable_resource
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if any registered exporter can handle the resource at [param res_path].

method.name: remove_exporter
method.description: Removes a previously registered [ResourceExporter] from the global registry.
